item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response directly refuses the new refrigerator-side confirmation person, names the three prior manual-gate patches, frames them as a repeated downstream manual fallback pattern, and moves ownership upstream to a shared process-control failure with system responsibility boundaries and a single control rule.
